## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` clean (and `cargo clippy` if applicable)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for logic changes
- [ ] No conversation content is read or transmitted (metadata only)
- [ ] `session-reporter` still never blocks/breaks the CLI (if touched)
